Frutiger Aero is a legendary aesthetic of the 2005–2013 era, forever remaining in our hearts as a symbol of optimism, purity, and the harmony between technology and nature. Glossy surfaces, bubbles, transparent textures, and vibrant blue and green tones created a sense of a reliable and bright future. This is the style of the Windows Vista and Nintendo Wii era—a time of cozy skeuomorphism that evokes a pleasant sense of nostalgia today.

Frutiger Aero is a design aesthetic and trend prevalent from roughly 2004 to 2013, characterized by glossy textures, vibrant blue and green palettes, and a utopian, tech-optimistic feel. It features skeuomorphism, 3D graphics, and natural elements like water, bubbles, and glass, marking a transition between the Y2K aesthetic and modern flat design.
